prompt.content: Please take the “promotional_campaigns.csv” file, convert it to an Excel file, and create a new Sheet in the new Excel file named “Promotion Calculations”. For each promotion type in the dataset, except data bonus promotions, please calculate the maximum and minimum number of days a promotion of that type lasted, inclusive of start and end dates. As well, please calculate the maximum and minimum absolute difference between target redemptions and actual redemptions for promotions in each promotion type, except data bonus promotions. Perform and display all the calculations I requested above using dynamic Excel formulas in the “Promotion Calculations” sheet.

rubrics.name: Identifies the minimum promotion duration for promotions in the percentage... (ver_d767d6051dc24232a8e5c8347e936d83)
